raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "Evoking a paradoxical state of passive stillness that arises from relinquishing intention, suggesting acceptance over striving",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "Effort and quietude are mutually exclusive in rest",
    "Lying quietly constitutes a form of non-sleeping presence",
    "Absence of intention naturally produces bodily stillness"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "Internally coherent as a literary conditional that uses apparent contradiction to highlight the irony of effortless rest versus deliberate striving",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "When read figuratively to explore themes of surrender, insomnia, mortality, or the futility of forcing natural processes",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "If taken as a literal behavioral prediction or practical advice about sleep hygiene rather than as evocative language"
}
